name: Pasta from Hell
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp Scotch bonnet chile peppers (finely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil and sauté the onion and red bell pepper over medium heat for about 4 minutes.
2. Add the bananas and pineapple juice, orange juice. Simmer over medium heat for 5 minutes, until the bananas are soft.
3. Remove from the heat, add the lime juice, cilantro, Scotch bonnet chile peppers, and 3 tablespoons of Parmesan cheese, and mix well.
4. In 4 quarts of boiling salted water, cook the fettuccine until al dente, about 8 to 10 minutes for dried pasta, 3 to 4 for fresh.
5. Drain and put it into a stainless steel bowl.
6. Add the spicy mixture, butter, and mix well. Season with salt and pepper to taste and garnish with the remaining grated Parmesan cheese.
